description_long: This object represents a person seated in a wheelchair, with a broad upper body and arms resting at their sides. The silhouette shows a distinct separation between the legs, indicating a seated posture, and the overall form is compact and upright. The wheelchair frame and wheels are not visibly distinct in the silhouette, making the chair itself blend with the figure. The head is slightly forward, and the feet are positioned flat on the ground, suggesting a stable seated position. No visible accessories or mobility aids are attached to the wheelchair. The figure appears to be dressed in casual clothing, with no additional items or features protruding from the main form.
description: A person seated upright in a wheelchair, with arms at their sides and legs separated, forming a compact silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad shoulders, arms at sides, and legs apart, emphasizing the seated posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the upright torso and the forward position of the head, with legs bent at the knees.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shoulders, and the outline of the seated figure, with legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the upright posture and the alignment of the legs and feet.
attribute_seating_posture: Upright with arms at sides and legs separated, feet flat on the ground.
